uses: Linociera paniculata is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine. Its leaves are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. Additionally, Linociera paniculata has been used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. More research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential medicinal uses and benefits.

Its extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in reducing pain and inflammation. Linociera paniculata has also been studied for its potential antidiabetic and anti-obesity properties.
